offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed discounts. We provide a vendor spend analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and categorizing vendor invoices, leading to missed savings opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on invoice tracking
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try invoice categorization and savings alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short user interviews for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
